cards.title: A small question for today.
cards.body: What have you been meaning to notice about yourself that you keep setting aside?

cards.title: Today's reflection is ready.
cards.body: When something bothers you, do you usually address it quickly or let it settle on its own?

cards.title: One quiet signal to notice today.
cards.body: What kind of decision have you been finding easier than expected lately?

cards.title: A small question for today.
cards.body: Is there something you value in others that you find difficult to ask for yourself?

cards.title: Today's reflection is ready.
cards.body: What gives you energy that you rarely make time for?

cards.title: One quiet signal to notice today.
cards.body: When you imagine your best day, what does it look like in the first hour?

cards.title: A small question for today.
cards.body: What have you changed your mind about in the past year?

cards.title: Today's reflection is ready.
cards.body: Which of your habits serves you, and which one are you quietly tolerating?

cards.title: One quiet signal to notice today.
cards.body: What do you tend to explain to people before they even ask?

cards.title: A small question for today.
cards.body: What does the version of you from five years ago not know about you yet?

cards.title: Today's reflection is ready.
cards.body: When do you feel most like yourself — and when do you feel furthest from it?

cards.title: One quiet signal to notice today.
cards.body: What are you curious about that feels too small to mention?

cards.title: A small question for today.
cards.body: What would you do differently if no one was watching, but you still knew?

cards.title: Today's reflection is ready.
cards.body: What kind of friction do you find yourself seeking out rather than avoiding?

cards.title: One quiet signal to notice today.
cards.body: What part of your life is moving in a direction you haven't fully named yet?
